summary: Implemented authority bounding and restriction propagation through module composition chains. Restriction composer collects intrinsic restrictions from a module and all transitive dependencies (monotonic tightening, I2). Authority validator ensures no module gains unauthorized capability types through composition. isWithinAuthority() provides per-action authority checks. End-to-end tests exercise multi-module scenarios through the full pipeline: manifest → DAG → capability resolution → restriction composition → snapshot build → ValidationEngine.evaluate().

verification.notes: 554 tests total (kernel: 213, module-loader: 144, runtime-host: 197). 31 new tests across 3 new test files. All CI gates pass (DEP-1, IC-1 through IC-5).
